name: 5ct Rainbow Shaped Candles - Spritz™
description:
Celebrate in style and brighten up your cakes with the 5ct Rainbow Shaped Candles from Spritz™. These candles feature a rainbow design for an added festive and playful element to your cake or dessert. Made from wax, the 5ct rainbow shaped candles from Spritz™ burn evenly and brightly, adding a warm and celebratory glow to your party.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
